nameLabel.comment: Label for collection name input field

namePlaceholder.comment: Placeholder text for collection name input

nameRequired.comment: Error message when name is required
nameRequired.es: El nombre de la colección es obligatorio
nameRequired.fr-ca: Le nom de la collection est requis
nameRequired.ja: コレクション名は必須です。

folderLabel.comment: Label for translations folder input field

folderPlaceholder.comment: Placeholder text for folder path input

folderRequired.comment: Error message when folder is required
folderRequired.es: La carpeta de traducciones es obligatoria
folderRequired.fr-ca: Le dossier de traductions est requis
folderRequired.ja: 翻訳フォルダが必要です

localesHint.source: Comma-separated list of locale codes. Leave empty to use global config.
localesHint.es: Lista de códigos de idioma separados por comas. Dejar vacío para usar la configuración global.
localesHint.fr-ca: Liste de codes de langue séparés par des virgules. Laisser vide pour utiliser la configuration globale.
localesHint.ru: Список кодов локали, разделённых запятыми. Оставьте пустым, чтобы использовать глобальную конфигурацию.
localesHint.ja: カンマ区切りのロケールコードのリスト。グローバル設定を使用する場合は空欄のままにしてください。
localesHint.de: Durch Kommas getrennte Liste von Gebietsschemacodes. Leer lassen, um die globale Konfiguration zu verwenden.

createButton.comment: Create button text in create mode

createTitle.ja: コレクションを作成する

addButton.comment: Button label to add a locale to the list

addLocaleLabel.comment: Label for the add locale input field

baseLocaleLocked.source: Base locale cannot be changed after creation
baseLocaleLocked.comment: Tooltip shown on the base locale radio button when in edit mode

duplicateLocale.source: This locale has already been added
duplicateLocale.comment: Validation error when the user tries to add a locale that is already in the list

invalidLocale.comment: Validation error shown when an entered locale code is not valid

localesEmpty.comment: Empty state message shown when no locales have been added to the list

removeAria.comment: Aria label for the remove button on each locale row

removeConfirmBody.source: Removing {{locales}} will permanently delete all translation data for those locales. This cannot be undone.
removeConfirmBody.comment: Body of the confirmation dialog when removing locales in edit mode

removeConfirmTitle.comment: Title of the confirmation dialog when removing locales in edit mode
